lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਯਾਲ ਚਰਣੰ ॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: saadh sangam raam raam ramanan saran naanak har har dayaal charanan |44|
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, the Lotus Feet of the Merciful Lord are found. ||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਅਟਵੀਅੰ ਮਹਾ ਨਗਰ ਬਾਸੰ ਧਰਮ ਲਖੵਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhai attaveean mahaa nagar baasan dharam lakhayan prabh meaa |
lines.english: The dreadful woods become a well-populated city; such are the merits of the righteous life of Dharma, given by God's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਦੇਵ ਮਾਨੁਖੵੰ ਪਸੁ ਪੰਖੀ ਬਿਮੋਹਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: gan gandharab dev maanukhayan pas pankhee bimohanah |
lines.english: You entice and fascinate even the heavenly heralds, celestial singers, gods, mortals, beasts and birds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਅਜਿਤ ਸੂਰ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਾਮੰ ਅਤਿ ਬਲਨਾ ਬਹੁ ਮਰਦਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: he ajit soor sangraaman at balanaa bahu maradanah |
lines.english: O emotional attachment, you are the invincible warrior of the battlefield of life; you totally crush and destroy even the most powerful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੰ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੰ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਗਦੀਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: har karanahaaran namasakaaran saran naanak jagadeesvarah |45|
lines.english: Nanak bows in humble surrender to the Lord; he seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord of the Universe. ||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਕਾਮੰ ਨਰਕ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮੰ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭ੍ਰਮਾਵਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: he kaaman narak bisraaman bahu jonee bhramaavanah |
lines.english: O sexual desire, you lead the mortals to hell; you make them wander in reincarnation through countless species.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਪ ਸੁਖ ਅਵਿਤ ਚੰਚਲ ਊਚ ਨੀਚ ਸਮਾਵਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: alap sukh avit chanchal aooch neech samaavanah |
lines.english: But you give only shallow pleasure, while you make the mortals weak and unsteady; you pervade the high and the low.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤ ਹਰਣੰ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਲੋਕ ਗੰਮੵੰ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੀਲ ਬਿਦਾਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: chit haranan trai lok gamayan jap tap seel bidaaranah |
lines.english: You cheat the consciousness, and pervade the three worlds. You destroy meditation, penance and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਵ ਭੈ ਬਿਮੁੰਚਿਤ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਓਟ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਹ ॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: tav bhai bimunchit saadh sangam ott naanak naaraaeinah |46|
lines.english: Your fear is dispelled in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, through the Protection and Support of the Lord. ||46||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਕਲਿ ਮੂਲ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੰ ਕਦੰਚ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਨ ਉਪਰਜਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: he kal mool krodhan kadanch karunaa na uparajate |
lines.english: O anger, you are the root of conflict; compassion never rises up in you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਯੰਤ ਜੀਵੰ ਵਸੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਨਿਰਤੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਜਥਾ ਮਰਕਟਹ ॥
lines.translit: bikhayant jeevan vasayan karot niratayan karot jathaa marakattah |
lines.english: You take the corrupt, sinful beings in your power, and make them dance like monkeys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਦਯਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਰਖੵਾ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: deen dukh bhanjan dayaal prabh naanak sarab jeea rakhayaa karot |47|
lines.english: O Destroyer of the pains of the poor, O Merciful God, Nanak prays for You to protect all begins from such anger. ||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਸਾਸਨ ਤਾੜੰਤਿ ਜਮਦੂਤਹ ਤਵ ਸੰਗੇ ਅਧਮੰ ਨਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: anik saasan taarrant jamadootah tav sange adhaman narah |
lines.english: Associating with you, mortals are debased and punished by the Messenger of Death in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੰ ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਡੋਲਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavant jeea bahu prakaaran anik bhaant bahu ddolate |
lines.english: You cause them to run around wildly in all directions, wobbling and wavering unsteadily.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਲੋਭਾ ਲੰਪਟ ਸੰਗ ਸਿਰਮੋਰਹ ਅਨਿਕ ਲਹਰੀ ਕਲੋਲਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: he lobhaa lanpatt sang siramorah anik laharee kalolate |
lines.english: O greed, you cling to even the great, assaulting them with countless waves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੰ ਨਚ ਇਸਟੰ ਨਚ ਬਾਧਵ ਨਚ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਤਵ ਲਜਯਾ ॥
lines.translit: nach mitran nach isattan nach baadhav nach maat pitaa tav lajayaa |
lines.english: You have no respect for friends, ideals, relations, mother or father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬਿਗੵਾਪ੍ਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਰਹਰਹ ॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: traeh traeh saran suaamee bigayaapt naanak har naraharah |48|
lines.english: Save me, save me - I have come to Your Sanctuary, O my Lord and Master; Nanak prays to the Lord. ||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਰਣੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਅਖਾਦੵਿ ਖਾਦੵੰ ਅਸਾਜੵੰ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਮਜਯਾ ॥
lines.translit: akaranan karot akhaaday khaadayan asaajayan saaj samajayaa |
lines.english: You make them do what they should not do. You make them eat what they should not eat. You make them accomplish what they should not accomplish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰੰ ਤਜੰਤਿ ਸਤ੍ਰੰ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਮਾਯਾ ਬਿਸ੍ਤੀਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: mitran tajant satran drirrant anik maayaa bisteeranah |
lines.english: You forsake friends, and hold tight to enemies. You spread out countless illusions of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਮੂਲੰ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੰ ਪਾਪਾਤਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: he janam maran moolan ahankaaran paapaatamaa |
lines.english: O egotism, you are the root of birth and death and the cycle of reincarnation; you are the very soul of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭਯਾਨ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਕਟ ਅਸਾਧ ਰੋਗਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhayaan udiaan ramanan mahaa bikatt asaadh roganah |
lines.english: You lead them to wander lost in the terrible wilderness of doubt; you lead them to contract the most horrible, incurable diseases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੰਤ ਜਾਵੰਤ ਥਕੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਬਹੁ ਭੋਗਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: aavant jaavant thakant jeea dukh sukh bahu bhoganah |
lines.english: You cause the living beings to come and go until they are exhausted. You lead them to experience pain and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਦੵੰ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸ੍ਵਰ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: baidayan paarabraham paramesvar aaraadh naanak har har hare |49|
lines.english: The only Physician is the Supreme Lord, the Transcendent Lord God. Nanak worships and adores the Lord, Har, Har, Haray. ||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਨਾਥ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਜਗਦ ਗੁਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: he praan naath gobindah kripaa nidhaan jagad guro |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, Master of the Breath of life, Treasure of Mercy, Guru of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਸਰਣਿ ਜੋਗ ਦਯਾਲਹ ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥ ਮਯਾ ਕਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: he saran jog dayaalah deenaa naath mayaa karo |
lines.english: O Merciful Lord, Potent to give Sanctuary, Master of the meek and humble, please be kind to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਤਾਪ ਹਰਣਹ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਸਭ ਦੁਖ ਹਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: he sansaar taap haranah karunaa mai sabh dukh haro |
lines.english: O Destroyer of the fever of the world, Embodiment of Compassion, please take away all my pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੀਰ ਸ੍ਵਸਥ ਖੀਣ ਸਮਏ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਦਾਮੋਦਰ ਮਾਧਵਹ ॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: sareer svasath kheen same simarant naanak raam daamodar maadhavah |50|
lines.english: Whether his body is healthy or sick, let Nanak meditate in remembrance on You, Lord. ||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਣੰ ਰਮਣੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal saranan ramanan gopaal keeratanah |
lines.english: I have come to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Lotus Feet, where I sing the Kirtan of His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਤਰਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਹਾ ਸਾਗਰ ਭੈ ਦੁਤਰਹ ॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: saadh sangen taranan naanak mahaa saagar bhai dutarah |51|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak is carried across the utterly terrifying, difficult world-ocean. ||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਖੵਾ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਧਨ ਚਰਣ ਰਖੵਾ ਜਗਦੀਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: aatam rakhayaa gopaal suaamee dhan charan rakhayaa jagadeesvarah |
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, has saved my soul; the Lord of the Universe has saved my wealth and feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰ ਮਸ੍ਤਕ ਰਖੵਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੰ ਹਸ੍ਤ ਕਾਯਾ ਰਖੵਾ ਪਰਮੇਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: sir mastak rakhayaa paarabrahaman hast kaayaa rakhayaa paramesvarah |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God has procted my head and forehead; the Transcendent Lord has protected my hands and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਰਖੵਾ ਗੁਰ ਦਯਾਲਹ ਭੈ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sarab rakhayaa gur dayaalah bhai dookh binaasanah |
lines.english: The Merciful Guru has protected everything, and destroyed my fear and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥੇ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਚੁਤਹ ॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal anaath naathe saran naanak purakh achutah |52|
lines.english: God is the Lover of His devotees, the Master of the masterless. Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Imperishable Primal Lord God. ||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਆਕਾਸੰ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੰ ਕਾਸਟ ਬੇਸਟੰ ॥
lines.translit: jen kalaa dhaario aakaasan baisantaran kaasatt besattan |
lines.english: His Power supports the sky, and locks fire within wood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਸਸਿ ਸੂਰ ਨਖੵਤ੍ਰ ਜੋਤੵਿੰ ਸਾਸੰ ਸਰੀਰ ਧਾਰਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: jen kalaa sas soor nakhayatr jotayin saasan sareer dhaaranan |
lines.english: His Power supports the moon, the sun and the stars, and infuses light and breath into the body.
